name: Scorer Validation Relevance review for Operational Practice and Policy Boundary Update bundle
summary: Accepted. The staged claims do not use operational QA/test-suite evidence as final scorer-validation evidence. Zhang et al. is relevant to scorer training utility because evaluation remains on held-out real student essays.

findings.claim_or_issue: New Meridian and Maine support implementation QA for machine-scored output, not final validation of statistical or LLM scoring models.
findings.why_it_matters: The central risk in this bundle is over-reading operational QA as deployment-readiness evidence.
findings.recommended_action: Retain the staged does_not_apply_when and limitations that exclude synthetic-only final validation and live scoring claims.
